scripts.dev: bun run --cwd apps/backend dev & bun run --cwd apps/frontend dev
scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/shared build && bun run --cwd apps/backend build && bun run --cwd apps/frontend build
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd apps/backend lint && bun run --cwd apps/frontend lint
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/backend typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/frontend typecheck
